phylogenetic-trees.description: Build phylogenetic and taxonomic trees with labeled nodes and branch lengths.
phylogenetic-trees.scopeWarning: Suitable for simplified phylogenies in theses. For complex phylogenetics with statistical support, use FigTree/iTOL and import as PDF.
phylogenetic-trees.defaultCaption: Simplified phylogeny of selected vertebrate classes.

dna-rna-sequences.description: Display biological sequences with color-coded bases, codon highlighting, and alignment marks.
dna-rna-sequences.defaultCaption: Start codon and reading frame of a short mRNA sequence.

biomedical-flow.description: Biological and clinical process flows — signaling pathways, metabolic steps, treatment algorithms.
biomedical-flow.defaultCaption: MAPK/ERK signalling cascade with feedback inhibition.

consort-flow.description: CONSORT-style flow diagrams for randomized clinical trials — enrollment, allocation, follow-up, analysis.

biological-pathways.description: Simplified metabolic and signaling pathway schemes for thesis figures.
biological-pathways.scopeWarning: Suitable for simplified pathway diagrams in theses and reports. Not a substitute for KEGG, Reactome, or professional pathway visualization tools.
biological-pathways.defaultCaption: Central carbon metabolism: glycolysis and TCA cycle entry.

chemical-formulas.description: Write chemical formulas with charges, states, and subscripts. Uses mhchem — LaTeX native.
chemical-formulas.defaultCaption: Selected inorganic formulas with oxidation states and phases.

chemical-reactions.description: Build chemical reaction equations with arrows, conditions, and catalysts. Uses mhchem.

reaction-equilibria.description: Chemical equilibrium reactions with conditions above/below the arrow. Uses mhchem.

chemical-structures.description: Simple organic structures and ring systems using ChemFig. Benzene, functional groups, ring compounds.
chemical-structures.scopeWarning: Suitable for simple organic structures in theses. Complex multi-ring systems may need manual ChemFig adjustment. For full structural chemistry, use ChemDraw and import as PDF/SVG.

basic-electrical-circuits.description: Visual circuit builder: resistors, capacitors, inductors, sources, switches, diodes. CircuiTikZ native.
basic-electrical-circuits.defaultCaption: RC low-pass filter circuit with voltage divider.

block-diagrams-control.description: Control system block diagrams with transfer functions, summing junctions, and feedback loops.
block-diagrams-control.defaultCaption: PID closed-loop control system block diagram.

flowcharts.description: Academic and process flowcharts with decision diamonds, process boxes, and connector arrows.

software-architecture.description: Component, layer, and system architecture diagrams.
software-architecture.scopeWarning: Suitable for standard architecture overviews. For complex UML or deployment diagrams, use Draw.io and import as PDF.

venn-set-diagrams.description: Create Venn diagrams and set-theory diagrams with labeled circles and intersections.
venn-set-diagrams.defaultCaption: Three-set Venn diagram showing mixed-methods research design.

plane-geometry.description: Geometric shapes: triangles, polygons, circles, angles, perpendiculars, parallels.
plane-geometry.defaultCaption: Right triangle with altitude from hypotenuse — geometric mean relations.

analytic-geometry.description: Coordinate systems with curves, lines, tangents, and labeled points.
analytic-geometry.defaultCaption: Parabola $f(x)=x^2-2x-3$ with roots, vertex, and tangent at $x=2$.

probability-trees.description: Visual probability trees with branch probabilities and outcomes. forest native.

lab-setups.description: Basic laboratory apparatus diagrams: flasks, beakers, burettes, tube assemblies.
lab-setups.scopeWarning: Covers standard lab apparatus. For specialized equipment diagrams, use dedicated illustration tools and import as PDF.

syntax-trees.description: Phrase-structure and dependency trees for linguistics. forest native.

concept-maps.description: Concept maps, mind maps, and argumentative structure diagrams.

visual-equations.description: Build mathematical equations, expressions, and formulas with a visual editor. Outputs LaTeX native.

matrices-determinants.description: Create matrices and determinants of any size with visual cell editing.
matrices-determinants.defaultCaption: 3D rotation matrix around the $z$-axis by angle $\theta$.

systems-of-equations.description: Build systems of linear or nonlinear equations with aligned formatting.
systems-of-equations.defaultCaption: System of three linear equations (fluid flow balance).

piecewise-functions.description: Define functions by cases or parts with a visual row editor.
piecewise-functions.defaultCaption: Heaviside step function and ReLU activation function.

vectors-fields.description: Draw vectors, vector decomposition, and simple field representations.

free-body-diagrams.description: Build free body diagrams with forces, mass blocks, and labeled arrows.
free-body-diagrams.defaultCaption: Free body diagram — block on surface with applied force at angle $\alpha$.

inclined-plane-pulleys.description: Mechanical systems: inclined planes, pulley setups, and spring-mass systems.
inclined-plane-pulleys.scopeWarning: Generates accurate schematic diagrams. Highly complex multi-pulley systems may need manual TikZ adjustments.

wave-oscillation.description: Sinusoidal waves, damped oscillations, and wave superposition. Covers SHM, transverse/longitudinal waves, and interference patterns.
wave-oscillation.defaultCaption: Sinusoidal wave $y = A\sin(\omega t)$ with damped envelope.

geometric-optics.description: Lenses, mirrors, ray diagrams, and refraction diagrams.
geometric-optics.scopeWarning: Suitable for standard ray diagrams. Complex optical systems with multiple elements may need manual adjustment.
geometric-optics.defaultCaption: Converging thin lens — three principal ray construction.

gantt-charts.description: Research and project Gantt charts with tasks, groups, milestones, and dependencies. pgfgantt native.

timelines.description: Historical, research, and narrative timelines with labeled events.

function-plots-2d.description: Plot mathematical functions with labeled axes, grid, and legend. PGFPlots native.

parametric-polar-plots.description: Parametric curves and polar function plots.

basic-statistics.description: Bar charts, histograms, and scatter plots from tabular data.
basic-statistics.defaultCaption: Comparative bar chart — measurement results by experimental group.

statistical-distributions.description: Normal, t, chi-squared, and other distributions with shaded regions.
statistical-distributions.defaultCaption: Standard normal distribution with 95\% confidence interval shaded.

kaplan-meier.description: Step-function survival curves for clinical and epidemiological studies.
kaplan-meier.scopeWarning: Enter pre-computed KM estimates (from R survfit, Stata stcurve, or SPSS) as data points forming a step function. Statistical tests must be done externally.
kaplan-meier.defaultCaption: Kaplan--Meier overall survival curves for adjuvant vs.\ standard chemotherapy ($n{=}200$; log-rank $p{=}0.008$).

network-graph.description: Co-authorship, citation, or social influence networks with community clustering.
network-graph.scopeWarning: Suitable for illustrative networks (≤ 15 nodes). For large-scale visualization, use Gephi or NetworkX and import as PDF.
network-graph.defaultCaption: Co-authorship network — two research clusters connected by a bridge author.

organic-chemistry-extended.description: Organic structures with rings, functional groups, and stereocentres. ChemFig native.
organic-chemistry-extended.scopeWarning: Complex multi-ring or stereo structures may need manual ChemFig adjustment. For publication-quality structures, use ChemDraw and import as PDF.

reaction-mechanisms.description: Reaction mechanisms including C-C bond forming reactions, substitutions, and eliminations.
reaction-mechanisms.scopeWarning: Suitable for standard mechanisms in theses. Complex multi-step mechanisms with curved arrows require manual ChemFig adjustment.
reaction-mechanisms.defaultCaption: Aldol condensation: base-catalysed formation of a $\beta$-hydroxy carbonyl compound.

er-diagrams.description: Entity-relationship diagrams for database design. TikZ native.
er-diagrams.scopeWarning: Suitable for standard ER diagrams in theses. Complex schemas with many entities benefit from Draw.io exported as PDF.
er-diagrams.defaultCaption: ER diagram for a university course-enrollment system.

state-machines.description: Finite state machines and automata with states, transitions, and labels.
state-machines.scopeWarning: Suitable for DFA/NFA and reactive system diagrams in theses. For large automata, generate from Graphviz/PlantUML and import as PDF.

markov-chains.description: Markov chain diagrams with states and transition probabilities.
markov-chains.scopeWarning: Suitable for illustrative Markov chains in theses. For inference or simulation, use R/Python and import results as figures.

bode-nyquist.description: Frequency response: Bode magnitude + phase, or Nyquist plot. Second-order transfer functions.
bode-nyquist.scopeWarning: Enter your system transfer function as a pgfplots expression. Compute poles/zeros in MATLAB/Python first.

plots-3d.description: 3D surfaces, wireframes, and contour plots. PGFPlots native.
plots-3d.scopeWarning: 3D plots compile slowly for fine meshes. Keep samples ≤ 25×25 for reasonable compile time.

phase-diagrams.description: Phase portraits, nullclines, and stability diagrams for dynamical systems.
phase-diagrams.scopeWarning: Suitable for 2D phase planes and nullcline plots. Full vector-field arrows require manual pgfplots quiver adjustments.
phase-diagrams.defaultCaption: Lotka--Volterra phase plane: prey $x$ vs predator $y$ nullclines ($\alpha{=}1,\beta{=}0.5,\gamma{=}0.75,\delta{=}0.25$).

heat-maps.description: Correlation matrices and heat maps using pgfplots matrix plot. Values between -1 and 1, color-mapped.
heat-maps.scopeWarning: Suitable for small matrices (≤ 10×10). Compute correlations in R/Python first, then enter the values here.
heat-maps.defaultCaption: Pearson correlation matrix for four psychometric variables.

supply-demand.description: Supply and demand with equilibrium, consumer/producer surplus, and optional curve shifts.
supply-demand.scopeWarning: Suitable for illustrative partial-equilibrium analysis in theses. Non-linear elasticity curves may need manual pgfplots adjustment.
supply-demand.defaultCaption: Supply and demand: original equilibrium $E_0$ and demand shift $D \to D'$ after income increase.

uml-class-diagrams.description: UML class diagrams with inheritance, interfaces, composition, and association.
uml-class-diagrams.scopeWarning: Generates simplified class boxes. For full UML compliance, use PlantUML or draw.io and import as PDF.
uml-class-diagrams.defaultCaption: Repository pattern with Observer: $<<$interface$>>$ classes, inheritance and composition.

time-series.description: Time series with trend, confidence band, and annotated events. Ideal for longitudinal data in economics, ecology, and clinical research.
time-series.scopeWarning: Enter data points manually. For large or complex time series (ARIMA, seasonal), generate in R/Python and import as PDF.
time-series.defaultCaption: Monthly CO$_2$ concentration (ppm) with long-term trend and $\pm$2\,SD band.

genealogy.description: Family trees, dynasties, and clinical pedigrees with generations and relationship markers.
genealogy.scopeWarning: Suitable for simplified family trees. For clinical genetic pedigrees with standard symbols (ACMG/AMP), use dedicated pedigree software.

parallel-coordinates.description: Parallel coordinate plots for multi-criteria comparison of alternatives across normalised dimensions (0--10 scale).
parallel-coordinates.scopeWarning: Normalise all criteria to a common scale (e.g. 0--10) before entering values. For many alternatives (>6), use Python/R and import as PDF.
parallel-coordinates.defaultCaption: Parallel coordinate plot comparing five software solutions on four criteria.

energy-band-diagrams.description: Energy level diagrams, band gaps, and semiconductor band diagrams for physics and materials science.
energy-band-diagrams.scopeWarning: Energy values are illustrative. Replace with your material's actual band gap and Fermi level values from literature or calculation.

decision-tree.description: Decision tree diagrams with conditions, branches, and leaf outcomes. Covers classification trees, CART, and clinical decision rules.
decision-tree.scopeWarning: Enter tree structure manually. For automatic tree generation from data, use scikit-learn/rpart and export the tree, then reproduce here for publication.

roc-curve.description: Receiver operating characteristic curves for classifier evaluation. Supports multiple classifiers with AUC annotation.
roc-curve.scopeWarning: Enter pre-computed TPR/FPR values from your statistical software (sklearn, R pROC). This plugin renders the curve; model training must be done externally.

population-pyramid.description: Age-sex population pyramid for demographic analysis. Shows male/female population distributions by age group.
population-pyramid.scopeWarning: Enter census data manually. For large datasets, generate the pyramid in R/Python and import as PDF, or use this plugin for illustrative sub-populations.

error-bars.description: Line or bar plots with error bars for means ± SD/SE/CI. Essential for presenting experimental or survey results.
error-bars.scopeWarning: Enter means and error values (SD, SE, or 95% CI half-width) computed from your data. Raw data processing must be done externally.

causal-dag.description: Directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) for causal inference frameworks, structural equation models, and mediation analysis.
causal-dag.scopeWarning: Suitable for causal diagrams up to ~10 variables. For complex SEM or large DAGs, use dagitty.net or lavaan and import the diagram.

bar-charts.description: Grouped and stacked bar charts, frequency histograms for descriptive statistics.
bar-charts.scopeWarning: Enter values manually. For charts from large datasets, generate in R/Python and import as PDF.
bar-charts.defaultCaption: Grouped bar chart — mean response by condition and time point ($\pm$\,SD).

box-violin-plots.description: Box-and-whisker plots with medians, quartiles, and outliers for comparing distributions.
box-violin-plots.scopeWarning: Enter pre-computed statistics (median, Q1, Q3) from R/Python. Each data point encodes: x=group position, y=median, error=IQR half-range.
box-violin-plots.defaultCaption: Distribution of test scores across three teaching conditions (box: Q1--Q3; whiskers: 1.5$\times$IQR).

scatter-regression.description: Scatter plot with linear regression line and optional confidence band.
scatter-regression.scopeWarning: Compute slope, intercept, and CI band in your statistical software. Enter the values here for publication-quality rendering.

bayesian-networks.description: Directed acyclic graphs for Bayesian networks: latent cause nodes (ellipses) with observed evidence nodes (rectangles).
bayesian-networks.scopeWarning: Suitable for illustrative Bayesian networks in theses. For inference, parameter learning, or dense graphs, use pgmpy, BayesFusion, GeNIe, or BUGS and import the final PDF/SVG.
bayesian-networks.defaultCaption: Bayesian network for differential diagnosis of respiratory illness.

sem-path-diagrams.description: Structural equation model path diagrams with latent variables and measurement models.
sem-path-diagrams.scopeWarning: Suitable for thesis-level SEM diagrams. For estimation, fit statistics, and standardized reports, use lavaan/R, Mplus, or AMOS and import the final diagram/table as PDF.
sem-path-diagrams.defaultCaption: Technology Acceptance Model (TAM): perceived usefulness and ease of use predicting behavioural intention.

economic-causal.description: Causal loop diagrams (CLD) with reinforcing and balancing feedback loops.
economic-causal.scopeWarning: Suitable for simple causal loop models. For full system dynamics with stocks, flows, delays, or simulation, use Vensim, Stella, or AnyLogic and import the final PDF/SVG.
economic-causal.defaultCaption: Wage--price spiral: reinforcing ($R$) and balancing ($B$) feedback loops.

legal-procedural.description: Flowcharts for legal and administrative procedures: judicial, regulatory, and compliance workflows.
legal-procedural.scopeWarning: Suitable for standard legal/administrative process flows in theses. Complex multi-party or multi-jurisdiction procedures are better maintained in BPMN/draw.io and imported as PDF.
legal-procedural.defaultCaption: Criminal procedure: from complaint to verdict.

pedagogical-diagrams.description: Bloom's taxonomy, learning outcome hierarchies, and curriculum maps for education theses.
pedagogical-diagrams.scopeWarning: Covers common pedagogical diagram patterns. For complex instructional-design models, keep the authoritative diagram in draw.io/Figma and import the final PDF/SVG.
pedagogical-diagrams.defaultCaption: Revised Bloom's taxonomy — six cognitive levels with representative verbs (Anderson \& Krathwohl, 2001).
